Node.help: Any consumer of stats, could be views or logs or other

Struct.name: StatValue
Struct.help: The value a stat at a point in time

Member.name: id
Member.help: The id of an array type stat value

Member.name: type
Member.help: The type a stat value, int or string

Member.name: intValue
Member.help: The value of a stat when type is int

Member.name: stringValue
Member.help: The value of a stat when type is string

Member.name: timestamp
Member.help: The timestamp of a stat value

Struct.name: StatChange
Struct.help: A new change in a list of stats

Member.name: newIndex
Member.help: The index of a new stat

Member.name: resultIndex
Member.help: The index of stat set value within stat request result. For each stat set value, there will be one set of stat result logged into the DataStore. And multiple set of values logged into views. This index will be identical with newIndex for result. It will be referencing to the result newIndex in view based stat set value."

Member.name: statSpecIndex
Member.help: The stat view statSpecList index of a new stat

Member.name: statSourceType
Member.help: The stat catalog source type of a new stat

Member.name: statName
Member.help: The stat catalog name of a new stat

Member.name: statSpecCaption
Member.help: The displayable caption of a new stat

Member.name: csvStatLabel
Member.help: The label of a new stat for a csv log

Member.name: csvFunctionLabel
Member.help: The label of the aggregation function for csv log

Member.name: filterGroupCaption
Member.help: A shorter identifier for specific filter

Member.name: filterGroupToolTip
Member.help: A longer identifier for specific filter

Struct.name: StatSet
Struct.help: A timestamped delivery of a set of stats along and changes in the list from the last delivery

Member.name: timestamp
Member.help: The timestamp for a stat set

Member.name: stats
Member.help: The list of stats in a stat set

Member.name: changes
Member.help: The list of changes in a stat set
